channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Outside 28 or 26, 14th June
item.description:
Chipboard pallets dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): The Avenue, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Potholes all over claremount road, 14th June
item.description:
Potholes everywhere
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Claremont Road, Brent Cross, Greater London

item.title: A hole, 14th June
item.description:
The area beside the manhole cover has formed a hole and you hear the cover move when vehicles travel over.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Yorkland Avenue, Falconwood, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipping of bin bags and other household items, 14th June
item.description:
Someone has fly tipped on the pavement with bin bags, household items and street signs

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Millfields Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Fly tipping, 14th June
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Kneller Road, Brockley, Greater London

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 14th June
item.description:
Rubbish dumped by the side of the road
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brampton Road, Bexleyheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: At 2016 this car was parked in a keep clear area, 14th June
item.description:
At 2016hrs on 14th June 2026 I asked the drivers to move their car from the illegal parking area. They refused. I asked them again and said I would take their number plate. They ignored me. I attach their number plate. Please enforce a fine for illegal parking as this area at the cul de sac end of clinton road is constanly being blocked by illegally parked cars. I have not seen any action by the council to stop this.

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bags dumped, 14th June
item.description:
The usual place where people fly tip. Someone has dumped 2 rubbish bags which have been split open and spilt everywhere

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Trafalgar Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of rubbish, 14th June
item.description:
There is lots of rubbish all along this street down the side of the church. Take away rubbish, bottles, cans etc.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Abbey Wood Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large dog foul, 14th June
item.description:
Large dog foul on Carlton grove by the Sainsbury’s, smeared all over the pavement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2D;89, Carlton Grove, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Sunday dump, 14th June

item.title: Electrical goods fly tipped, 14th June

item.title: Pavement broken, 14th June
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 71, Ashfield Road, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: LBB car park filthy with litter and rubbish, 14th June
item.description:
What are we paying for? Clearly not keeping your car parks clean and presentable. Corner of car park and along edge is a litter and rubbish strewn mess - please attend early next week and clear.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Burnhill Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
